description: Create a content slide with a horizontal multi-series bar chart in a full layout showing rankings of industries by expected PE M&A transaction activity from 2017 to 2019, highlighting that the top three industries remained unchanged.

header.kicker: PE Outlook 2019 compared to previous years
header.headline: No change in expectations over the last three years regarding the top three industries for M&A activities
header.sub: Ranking of industries by number of M&A transactions by year, 2017-2019 [2019 order; %]

main.title:
"In what industries do you expect to see the most M&A transactions with PE investor involvement in 2019 (2018/2017)?"

Legend: 2017 vs. 2016, 2018 vs. 2017, 2019 vs. 2018; Note: Multiple answers possible
